author_identification.canonical_name_ar: أَبُو إِسْحَاقَ إِبْرَاهِيْمُ بنُ عَبْدِ اللهِ بنِ الجُنَيْدِ الخُتَّلِيُّ
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Hadith scholar and ascetic known for his contributions to the science of Hadith and Sufism.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A collection of Hadiths and sayings focusing on the love of God, reflecting early Sufi thought.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: One of the early works linking Hadith literature with Sufi themes of divine love.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Dr. Adel bin Abdul Shukoor Al-Zarqi is known for his meticulous tahqiq work in Islamic texts.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The editor likely relied on multiple manuscript sources and cross-referenced with other Hadith collections.
